name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, coordinator, decision

(* State can be "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
          /\ coordinator \in Participants
          /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ state = "Init"
        /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "Pending"]
        /\ coordinator \in Participants
        /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare == /\ state = "Init"
           /\ state' = "Prepared"
           /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Yes"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, decision>>

VoteYes == /\ state = "Prepared"
           /\ votes[coordinator] = "Pending"
           /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Yes"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<state, coordinator, decision>>

VoteNo == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ votes[coordinator] = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "No"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, coordinator, decision>>

Commit == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ decision' = "Commit"
          /\ state' = "Committed"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, coordinator>>

Abort == /\ state = "Prepared"
          /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ decision' = "Abort"
          /\ state' = "Aborted"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, coordinator>>

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, coordinator, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a sequence of booleans: TRUE if fork is free, FALSE if taken *)
Init == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N |-> TRUE]
  /\ state \in [1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper to determine if a philosopher can eat: both adjacent forks are free *)
CanEat(i) == forks[i] /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i + 1)]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
       /\ state[i] = "hungry"
       /\ CanEat(i)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = FALSE]
    \/ (* Philosopher i stops eating *)
       /\ state[i] = "eating"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = TRUE]
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ state[i] = "thinking"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1]
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 0]
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ head' = head

Next == \/ Producer
        \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server, Follower, Candidate, Leader, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> Follower]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Follower /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Candidate /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Leader /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Follower /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Candidate /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        \/ \E s \in Server : state[s] = Leader /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Process

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, recorded, markerSent

Init == /\ state = [p \in Process |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [p \in Process |-> [q \in Process \ {p} |-> <<>>]]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Process |-> [q \in Process \ {p} |-> <<>>]]
        /\ recorded = [p \in Process |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [p \in Process |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ \E p \in Process :
          /\ recorded[p] = FALSE
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
          /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = channel[p]]
          /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = <<>> \o <<marker>> \o channel[p][q] : q \in Process \ {p}]
        \/ /\ \E p \in Process : \E q \in Process \ {p} :
          /\ channel[p][q] = <<marker>> \o rest
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = rest]
          /\ state' = state
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
          /\ recorded' = recorded
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        \/ /\ \E p \in Process : \E q \in Process \ {p} :
          /\ channel[p][q] = <<msg>> \o rest
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = rest]
          /\ state' = state
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
          /\ recorded' = recorded
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, recorded, markerSent>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES token, message

Init == 
  /\ token \in 1..N
  /\ message = <<>>

Next == 
  /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
  /\ message' = message

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, message>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

              /\ chosen' = chosen
        \/ /\ proposers[i].ballot' = 1
           /\ proposers[i].value' = NULL

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, chunks, nextChunk, retransmits, sent, state, timer

    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(File))
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmits \in Seq(0..MaxRetries)
    /\ timer \in 0..Timeout
    /\ state \in {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingAck"}
    /\ nextChunk \in 1..Len(chunks) \/ nextChunk = Len(chunks) + 1

Init ==
    /\ chunks = ChunkSequence(File, ChunkSize)
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retransmits = Rep(0, Len(chunks))
    /\ timer = Timeout
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk = 1

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk <= Len(chunks)
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, 0)
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked>>

WaitAck ==
    /\ state = "Sending"
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

AckReceived ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ state' = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk + 1
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, 0)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer' = 0
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, Retransmits[nextChunk] + 1)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked>>

TimeoutTick ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, nextChunk>>

Done ==
    /\ nextChunk > Len(chunks)
    /\ state = "Idle"

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ WaitAck
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ TimeoutTick
    \/ Done

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer, state, nextChunk>>

---- MODULE FileSender ----
====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLE flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, K

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j \in 1..N : infected[j]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => known'[j] = known[j] /\ infected'[j] = infected[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ infected \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == 
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in free :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in allocated[c] :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
        /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, publishers, messages, state



Init == 
   /\ subscribers = << >>
   /\ publishers = << >>
   /\ messages = << >>
   /\ state = << >>

Next == 
   /\ subscribers' = subscribers
   /\ publishers' = publishers
   /\ messages' = messages
   /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, publishers, messages, state>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
           /\ wants[1] = FALSE
           /\ turn' = turn
           /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
           /\ wants[1] = TRUE
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
           /\ wants[1] = FALSE
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
           /\ wants[1] = TRUE
           /\ turn' = turn
           /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E delta \in Nat :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = counts[n][n] + delta]
          /\ \A m \in Node \ {n} : counts'[n][m] = counts[n][m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
